title: Triple journal — system-wide journal index + cross-repo change log
_note: Identical in all three repos (part of the shared 'map of the whole' set; see DOCUMENT_DISTRIBUTION.json). Human companion: TRIPLE_JOURNAL.md. A distributed backup: the cross-repo record survives in any one repo. Gate: Peter Higgins; honest-broker; lose nothing.

Hs.leaf_journals: per-experiment JOURNAL.md under experiments/ and HCI-CNT/experiments/

Triple journal added — system-wide journal index + cross-repo log, identical in all three
Document-distribution policy + coherence verifier (three homes; single source of truth; the shared set)

CROSS_BRAIN.md made a true all-three file (RWA now carries it; pre-existing Hs<->HUF section-3 drift reconciled)

maintenance_rule: Log only cross-repo-affecting changes here, identically in all three repos in the same change; single-repo work stays in that repo's own hubs. Verify parity with verify_tri_repo_coherence.py before push. Append, never trim.
